div.head: The Minister in Liberia (Hood) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 29. Department’s telegram 19, July 15, 6 p.m. President King feels that he must have Secretary Barclay’s report and the actual signed documents in his hands before issuing the call for a special session of the Legislature. There has been a certain amount of adverse propaganda and President King desires to be in a position to support all the loan terms unequivocally and to stand solidly for immediate ratification. Upon receipt of the above information he will call a special session, no matter how near the date of the regular session may be.
